subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: The entrance to the Kingdom of God depends upon the absolute Bounty of God. If the grace of God descends upon the soul, it will be accepted. Acceptance is not due to capacity or ability.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
